title: 10DLC (10-Digit Long Code)
html:
10DLC (10-Digit Long Code)

Stub. US carrier registration regime for application-to-person SMS sent from standard 10-digit numbers — adjacent to the telnyx-style telecom-stack research Yahir did for rankett cold-outreach. Brand and use-case registration via TCR; throughput tied to trust score.

Source summaries

  • telnyx
  • cold outreach stack
  • rankett
